description:
An external party: customer, vendor, or partner.

Supports hierarchical relationships (parent/child customers) via
parent_id. External system IDs stored in external_ids dict for
cross-system reconciliation.

source_system.description: Adapter or system that produced this record (e.g. 'whk-wms').
source_system.title: Source System

source_id.description: Primary key of this entity in the source system.
source_id.title: Source Id

captured_at.description: UTC timestamp when this snapshot was captured by Forge.
captured_at.title: Captured At

metadata.description: Source-system-specific fields that don't map to core schema.
metadata.title: Metadata

parent_id.description: Reference to parent entity for hierarchies (by source_id).
parent_id.title: Parent Id

is_active.description: Whether this entity is currently active.
is_active.title: Is Active

title: BusinessEntity
